productDisplayName: iPanema Women Neo Black Flip Flops
description: ipanema flip-flops draw inspiration from the culture of the Brazilian city of Ipanema. The tropical city's street style is reinterpreted in ipanema footwear - bold prints, vibrant colours and quirky embellishments. A brand with a cause, iPanema collaborated with Gisele Bü ndchen for a climate change project and these products represent their commitment to social-change. Upper Slim T-straps with grooves and branding Soft footbed Branded lug on the footbed Curved footbed Outsole Single piece PVC moulded, flexible outsole Waffle patterned grooves Flip flop care Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
